title: ListThingModelVersionsRequestPayload
description: Request payload for listing xRegistry Thing Model Versions, optionally filtered by Group, Thing Model, and/or label.

groupId.description: Group identifier. Uses the default Group if not specified. Ignored if allGroups is true.

allGroups.description: If true, lists Versions across all Groups (groupId is ignored). If false or unspecified, lists within the Group specified by groupId, or the default Group if groupId is unspecified.

thingModelId.description: Thing Model Resource identifier. If specified, only Versions of the Thing Model with this identifier are listed; when listing across all Groups, this identifier is matched across all Groups. Lists Versions across all Thing Models if not specified.

label.description: If specified, only Versions with this label are listed.
